title: Intensely Sweet Peruvian Sweet Potatoes Picarones
description: Earthy and creamy Peruvian dish featuring ginger cordial, served in a paella pan, this low glycemic friendly treat is a nostalgic delight, the picarones are wrapped in a ssam style wrap
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine the mashed sweet potatoes, ginger cordial, anise seeds, cinnamon, and low glycemic sugar, mix until well combined.
In a separate bowl, whisk the egg and vanilla extract, then add to the sweet potato mixture and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and pliable.
Divide the dough into 4-6 equal pieces and roll each piece into a ball.
Flatten each ball into a disk shape and wrap each disk in a ssam wrap.
Place the wrapped picarones in a paella pan, leaving some space between each one.
Bake the picarones in the preheated oven for 20 minutes, or until they are golden brown.
Remove the picarones from the oven and let them cool for a few minutes before serving.
